extra.reason: Implemented: (1) staleness gate returns 409 market_data_stale when cached prices lag last_completed_trading_day, (2) manual scans now run cache_only (no yfinance fallback), (3) verified per-market queue parallelism works (US/HK on separate workers), (4) CLAUDE.md updated, (5) 3 new tests added.

Implemented: breadth + IBD group rankings now fan out for US/HK/JP/TW/IN via MarketTaxonomyService bridge; added market column + alembic migration; swapped NYSE-only market_hours for per-market MarketCalendarService; 52 affected tests green (163 broader regression sweep also green).
Implemented explicit allow-stale bootstrap path for static-site daily price seeding, with tests.
Completed resumable sharded CN daily price workflow
Addressed CN workflow code review findings: branch-safe release publishing, per-batch checkpoints, date validation, and checkpoint manifest verification
Addressed PR 175 review feedback: durable pinned CN weekly reference plan and date-object completeness comparison
Fixed missing GH_TOKEN/GH_REPO env for CN shard checkpoint uploads
Fixed CN combine coverage failure by keeping BJSE on AKShare and allowing stale-present rows in final export
Added explicit CN final bundle coverage threshold so bootstrap combine tolerates provider gaps while preserving strict defaults

Captured static-site page tour GIF via Playwright + ffmpeg + gifski. Output at docs/gifs/static-site-tour.gif (4.0 MB, ~19s, 1200px wide). Pipeline scripts at frontend/scripts/. README and SCREENSHOT_GUIDE updated.
Completed SG weekly reference bundle support and verification
Implemented browser-safe static JSON output, expanded MY Main/ACE fallback universe with minimum-size guard, and added regression coverage for static liquidity filter semantics.

Added drift guard tests for market code surfaces, catalog/registry exchange alias drift, BSE market-scoped ambiguity, frontend fallback catalog codes, and endpoint capability allowlists. Verified with: backend/venv/bin/python -m pytest tests/unit/domain/test_market_catalog.py tests/unit/domain/markets/test_market.py tests/unit/domain/markets/test_market_registry.py tests/unit/domain/markets/test_market_drift_guards.py tests/unit/test_provider_routing_policy.py tests/unit/test_field_capability_registry.py -q
Completed: StockUniverse has nullable listing_tier, status audit rows have event_type, and a minimal ListingTierRegistry is available for ingestion normalization.
Completed: Market Catalog now exposes canonical MIC facts, supported currencies, fallback default currency, runtime payload compatibility fields, and drift guards.
Addressed review findings with per-MIC fact declarations and drift guards, nullable metadata audit events, and scoped listing-tier alias resolution.

Completed: added Market-scoped MIC alias registry, made ambiguous aliases such as BSE require Market context, and routed MarketRegistry/SecurityMaster compatibility lookups through canonical MIC resolution.

Addressed review findings with a dedicated MarketSymbolSuffixRegistry, explicit ambiguous-alias failure in SecurityMaster, CJK suffix-registry reuse, and removal of MarketRegistry global exchange alias state.

Completed: UniverseDefinition now derives Market/Exchange/IndexName values from backend registries, validates Market/MIC/exchange/listing_tier scopes against Market Catalog, MIC aliases, IndexRegistry, and ListingTierRegistry, preserves ALL as global active rows, and resolves Market MIC/tier filters into StockUniverse queries.

Addressed review findings by deriving Market Catalog and MarketRegistry index summaries from IndexRegistry, extracting universe normalization helpers, and centralizing UniverseDefinition scan storage projection.

Completed: added ProviderDataPlanRegistry for fundamentals, migrated fundamentals routing callers to registry-backed plans, and recorded plan version provenance in data source, hybrid batch, and cache payloads.

Completed focused thermo-nuclear follow-up: routing policy version/docs now defer to ProviderDataPlan, single-symbol hybrid market inference uses canonical suffix facts and skips unsupported finviz, and get_many DB fallback attaches provider plan provenance before return/Redis warm.

Completed price ProviderDataPlanRegistry support: added prices dataset plans and CN XBSE override, routed BulkDataFetcher price execution through provider plan steps, attached price plan provenance, and let market-scoped price cache fallback defer batch sizing to the provider plan.

Completed price-side adapter extraction from thermo-nuclear review: BulkDataFetcher now delegates price ProviderDataPlan execution to provider_adapters/price_plan_executor.py, SecurityMaster owns suffix-specific MIC inference, and PriceCacheService no longer retries by dropping market context. Remaining fundamentals adapter migration split to StockScreenClaude-i4z7.

Completed: extracted fundamentals execution into provider_adapters, added CN/XBSE fundamentals plan override, updated hybrid route decisions to use adapter plan helpers, and verified affected market-provider suites pass.

Completed: decomposed fundamentals execution into provider adapters and ProviderExecutionResult, removed CN/KR provider-name branches from the executor, made hybrid route decisions use adapter capabilities, and preserved affected provider behavior under tests.

Completed: added shared CanonicalUniverseRow, lifecycle/provenance/rejected/result models, catalog-backed MIC/currency/listing-tier normalization, and active Market/MIC/local_code duplicate enforcement with focused domain tests.

Completed: added shared UniverseIngestionPipeline, migrated SG ingestion to shared canonical row/result models and pipeline persistence, propagated SG listing tier from official source board metadata, replaced official snapshot dispatch chain with registry lookup, and verified affected Universe suites.
Migrated remaining official-source market ingestion paths onto UniverseIngestionPipeline with legacy adapter boundary, IN coverage gate preservation, and CN taxonomy hook.
Completed: moved CN taxonomy and IN coverage side effects into typed pipeline paths.
Completed: moved FX enrichment to row currency with fallback-only market defaults and currency/timezone drift guards.
Completed: extracted row market/currency facts resolver, moved active-universe drift checks behind shared helpers, added public row-currency FX regression, and guarded fallback market-currency usage.
Completed: derived Market validation, registry identity facts, queue supported markets, and runtime supported-market/catalog payload from Market Catalog.
Completed: app capabilities now expose catalog-backed runtime Universe options with supported/enabled market separation and no live readiness state.
Completed review follow-up: runtime Universe options now derive option definitions from canonical UniverseDefinition validation and serialization.
Completed runtime-backed scan controls for market, MIC, index, and listing-tier universe options.
Completed: endpoint market allowlists now derive from Market Catalog capability queries for breadth, group rankings, and scan refresh; drift tests guard the catalog-backed assignments.

Completed: MarketCalendarService now reads calendar, provider-calendar, timezone, and default-currency facts from Market Catalog MIC Facts; market-level calls fall back to the primary MIC and public calendar checks accept mic-specific lookup. Verified with: backend/venv/bin/python -m pytest backend/tests/unit/domain/test_market_catalog.py backend/tests/unit/domain/markets/test_market_registry.py backend/tests/unit/test_market_drift_guards.py backend/tests/unit/test_market_calendar_service.py backend/tests/unit/test_market_calendar_service_engine.py backend/tests/unit/test_breadth_tasks.py backend/tests/unit/test_group_rank_tasks.py; git diff --check.
